How it works

Workplace transformation doesn't happen in silos.

Most CRE teams run transaction management, lease administration, and portfolio planning across disconnected systems. LiquidSpace connects them all, with AI running across each layer continuously.

Access

Book workspace anywhere, within policy.

Every workspace booking is tied to your eligibility rules, budgets, and approval workflows — and generates the behavioral signal that powers every important decision downstream.

Operations

Govern programs. Manage commitments.

From setting who can book and where, to managing every license and transaction — all of it runs through one system. AI supports every step so you focus on decisions, not admin.

Strategy

Know what your portfolio should do next.

Hub placement, footprint sizing, lease renewal — modeled with live behavioral data from your own portfolio. So when it's time to decide, you already know the answer.

Each layer makes the next one smarter.
Access generates signal → Operations governs action → Strategy refines decisions ↻ Watch a 2-min overview
